description: AlembicAgent public API boundary policy. Exact package exports are the only supported consumer entrypoints; no wildcard, deep dist/src, or host-owned adapter imports are allowed.

forbiddenConsumerSpecifierSamples.reason: Aggregate tools subpath was retired in Train B IC3 after all consumers migrated to the @alembic/agent root facade; use the root facade or the fine-grained ./tools/v2 and ./tools/terminal exports.
Consumers must not import compiled package internals.
Consumers must not import source internals.
Only @alembic/agent/tools/v2 is public; router internals stay Agent-owned.
Only @alembic/agent/tools/terminal is public; terminal session internals stay Agent-owned.
Service internals and host adapters must not become package subpaths.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Package identity and top-level Agent runtime metadata.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns process lifecycle, daemon wiring, CLI/native shell, and product delivery.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Agent capability, strategy, run, memory, context, and orchestration aggregate.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns product routes, daemon API endpoints, and persistence placement.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Agent service orchestration and runtime builder APIs.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns HTTP/MCP/CLI adapters and injects host services through explicit contexts.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Agent execution loop, event bus, budget, diagnostics, messages, and tool pipeline contracts.
agentOwned: D10 interface contract branch fixtures and legacy rewrite dispositions
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns process execution, filesystem/network permission gates, and UI/daemon lifecycle adapters.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Prompt builders, insight budget helpers, and pipeline stage prompt contracts.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns model selection policy, user-facing prompt invocation, and product-specific prompt routing.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Agent-side evidence collection, episodic consolidation, and consolidation gate helpers.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns durable storage adapters and product-specific evidence ingestion routes.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Agent-owned tool forge, temporary registry, sandbox runner contract, and requirement analysis.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns concrete sandbox isolation, shell execution, and installed tool lifecycle.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Reusable Agent task handlers consumed by host AI routes.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns route authentication, request shaping, and persistence side effects.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Built-in Agent profile presets, registry, compiler, and strategy resolution.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns user/project profile selection, storage, and UI configuration.

publicContractMatrix.contract: AI provider adapters, model registry, transports, and provider manager.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns credential retrieval, account policy, network permission, and provider enablement UI.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Tool V2 router, cache, compressor, parser, capability catalog, and adapter contract.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns ToolContextFactory inputs, external executor wiring, sandbox bridge, and UI/daemon call surfaces.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Terminal capability manifests, policy builders/evaluators, session contract, and portable result envelopes.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns real process/PTY execution, sandbox enforcement, approval UI, and terminal persistence storage.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Agent memory stores, consolidation, retrieval, active context, and session persistence contracts.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns durable database/filesystem placement, migration timing, and product account boundaries.

publicContractMatrix.contract: Conversation store, context window, exploration tracker, plan tracker, and nudging contracts.
publicContractMatrix.hostOwnedAdapterBoundary: Host owns conversation transport, UI presentation, and product-specific context injection.
